future_systems.name: Decomposition
future_systems.later_hook: Split larger plans into ordered, traceable Slices without changing the Phase 1 plan-audit contract.
future_systems.phase1_boundary: Phase 1 audits and runs the Slice it is given; it does not implement an autonomous decomposition queue.

future_systems.name: Parallel Fleet And Merge Queue
future_systems.later_hook: Compare parallel runs, lease workspaces, and expose human-visible merge candidates.
future_systems.phase1_boundary: Phase 1 does not implement merge queue, workspace pool, or multi-repo orchestration.

future_systems.name: Verification Pyramid
future_systems.later_hook: Group evidence into unit, integration, e2e, canary, replay, and policy layers.
future_systems.phase1_boundary: Phase 1 records and gates evidence; it does not replace project-specific test ownership.

future_systems.name: Autonomy And Self-Healing
future_systems.later_hook: Reason about promotion, retry, and self-healing policies from auditable evidence.
future_systems.phase1_boundary: Phase 1 does not implement autonomous retry.

future_systems.name: Economic Governor
future_systems.later_hook: Support cost accounting, budget allocation, and throughput tradeoff decisions.
future_systems.phase1_boundary: Phase 1 does not implement economic governor.

future_systems.name: Learning Loop
future_systems.later_hook: Propose reusable lessons while keeping provenance and redaction requirements attached.

future_systems.name: Throughput Upgrades
future_systems.later_hook: Analyze bottlenecks, station parallelism, and operator-facing throughput tuning.
future_systems.phase1_boundary: Phase 1 does not implement fleet scheduling or multi-repo orchestration.
